description: User creates a new account via email or Google
User signs in to their existing account (email or Google)
User chooses to continue as a guest without an account
User creates a new work item on the dashboard
User marks a work item as finished (top of completion funnel)
User deletes a work item from the dashboard
User completes a todo task within a work item (awards 10 points)
User starts a Pomodoro focus or break session
A Pomodoro focus or break session timer reaches zero
User creates a new financial account in the Expense Tracker
User records a new financial transaction (withdrawal, deposit, or transfer)
User sends a friend request to another user
User accepts an incoming friend request
User saves their profile settings (display name, username, avatar, status)
